title: gonolobus saraguranus
intro: Gonolobus saraguranus, also known as the "Saragura vine" or "Mexican milktongue", is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Gonolobus saraguranus are attributed to its ability to treat various conditions, such as wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus saraguranus often involve the roots and leaves being dried and made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which are then applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
